scripts.pub: changeset && changeset version && pnpm run build && changeset publish
scripts.pub:patch:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const has=fs.readdirSync('.changeset').some(f=>f.endsWith('.md')&&f!=='README.md');if(!has)fs.writeFileSync('.changeset/auto-bump.md','---
"cmap-core": patch
---

Version bump.
')" && changeset version && pnpm run build && changeset publish
scripts.pub:minor:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const has=fs.readdirSync('.changeset').some(f=>f.endsWith('.md')&&f!=='README.md');if(!has)fs.writeFileSync('.changeset/auto-bump.md','---
"cmap-core": minor
---

Version bump.
')" && changeset version && pnpm run build && changeset publish
scripts.pub:major:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const has=fs.readdirSync('.changeset').some(f=>f.endsWith('.md')&&f!=='README.md');if(!has)fs.writeFileSync('.changeset/auto-bump.md','---
"cmap-core": major
---

Version bump.
')" && changeset version && pnpm run build && changeset publish
scripts.build:publish: tsc && vite build && npm run build:demo && cp -rf dist haitu-demo package.json debug index.html /Users/yikaichen/Projects/chenzq/cmap-core/ && cd /Users/yikaichen/Projects/chenzq/cmap-core && git add . && (git commit -m "chore: update dist and package.json $(date +'%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S')" || echo "No changes to commit") && git push
